response:
Subject: Clarification Regarding Current Machine Vision Device  

Dear [Recipient's Name],  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.  

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup. Our device is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used in this unit is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor (I have attached the technical data for your reference).  

For detailed information about the device, please refer to page 18 of the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file. If you would like to review the quantum efficiency details, you can find them on page 13 of the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file.  

I will study the files and manuals more carefully and keep you informed.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
